narrative:
Hopewell-Loudon Local Sd (Seneca) school district has 2,856 registered voters, with 48.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.9 percentage points.
